EnterpriseSDK
Table of Contents

Interface IXMLSerializeData

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.esriSystem
Assembly
ESRI.Server.System.dll

Provides access to members that serialize and deserialize data from XML.

[Guid("5BB4A18D-43BC-41C5-987A-2206FD15488F")]
[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
public interface IXMLSerializeData

Properties

Count

Number of XML elements.

int Count { get; }

Property Value

int

string
